title: calyptrocalyx reflexus
intro: Calyptrocalyx reflexus, also known as the "daintree cycad", is a species of plant that belongs to the family Arecaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Calyptrocalyx reflexus are attributed to its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
